title: clerodendrum leucobotrys
intro: Clerodendrum leucobotrys, a tropical plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is also known as the White Glory Bower or White Clerodendrum, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum leucobotrys include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an insect repellent and a treatment for wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or extract in traditional medicine.
